description_long: This is a DeWalt-branded cordless electric drill, featuring a robust yellow and black plastic housing with ergonomic contours for comfortable handling. The drill is equipped with a visible battery pack at the base, labeled as 18V, and a prominent trigger button on the handle. The metallic chuck at the front securely holds a long, spiral twist drill bit, suitable for drilling into wood, metal, or masonry. The body includes textured grip areas and a side label with the DeWalt logo, while the rear and top surfaces are reinforced with additional plastic and metal components. The overall design is compact and portable, making it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban construction sites.
description: A yellow and black DeWalt cordless electric drill with an 18V battery pack and a twist drill bit, featuring ergonomic grips and a visible trigger button.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWalt logo, ergonomic handle, battery pack, and the full length of the attached twist drill bit.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the symmetrical design of the drill's body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the battery pack, handle contours, and the metallic chuck with the drill bit extending forward.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the drill bit, chuck, and the forward-facing elements of the drill's body.
